projects.name: FinTech Credit Risk & Fraud Command Center
projects.desc: End-to-end transaction ingestion and credit evaluation pipeline. Integrates a Random Forest classifier predicting loan eligibility with real-time transactional fraud checks.

projects.name: Automated Daily Data Insights
projects.desc: Stateless serverless daily financial data ingestion pipeline calling yFinance, computing rolling Z-score anomalies, and committing reports automatically via GitHub Actions.

projects.name: Sales Operations & Customer Segmentation
projects.desc: Star schema database pipeline modeling Pareto 80/20 sales distributions. Automates RFM scaling and K-Means clustering to classify customers into 4 target personas.

projects.name: Clinical Trials Patient Outcomes Analysis
projects.desc: Clinical database pipeline tracking patient survival and blood pressure across 3 treatment arms. Computes Log-Rank test statistics and Kaplan-Meier curves.

projects.name: Tax Anomaly Audit Compliance Engine
projects.desc: Relational general ledger audit pipeline modeling transaction values following Benford's Law distribution and executing Isolation Forest anomaly flags for audit risk.

projects.name: AI Model Observability & Fairness Audits
projects.desc: Audits machine learning models in production by running Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) tests to track input data drift and evaluating Disparate Impact for bias protection.

projects.name: Real-Time IoT Telematics & Predictive Maintenance
projects.desc: Processes high-frequency EV fleet battery and motor sensor telemetry in streaming micro-batches, detecting Z-score anomalies and estimating Remaining Useful Life (RUL).

projects.name: Multi-State Land Use Emissions Analysis
projects.desc: Geospatial emissions intelligence pipeline processing daily land cover changes across 5 U.S. states. Computes CO₂ inventory and forecasts emissions with ~90% accuracy using Linear Regression and Random Forest.

projects.name: AI-ML Data Science Simulation
projects.desc: Retail data pipeline automating daily sales ingestion from 5 U.S. branches. Centralizes operations in SQL and uses Linear Regression/Random Forest forecasting to reduce stockouts by 15%.

projects.name: Extending STEM across ASL
projects.desc: Inclusive educational learning platform utilizing a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) in TensorFlow/Keras to recognize American Sign Language gestures for 7 core STEM concepts.
